description: These stylish Vedano 5 shoes from puma have a motorsport friendly design and are great for urban wear. These shoes are infused with an attractive low-profile design and Velcro strap that looks great when teamed with jeans and a tee. (Did you know... in 1968 Puma became the first brand to offer sports shoes fastened with Velcro!) Upper Leather uppers for durability and protection Lightly padded collar and tongue for greater comfort Textile lining for extra comfort Brand name embroidered on the tongue and cat logo on the heel counter Elasticated loop with velcro closure on the mid-foot for a snug Fit and easy insertion and removal of the feet Outsole Non-slip rubber outsole in a tyre tread pattern for greater traction Flex grooves for greater flexibility of the feet Sole extending to heel counter for greater protection of the heel shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
